description: Style NoteCut a dash with these sandals for the cosmopolitan male from coolers. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket.Product DetailsBlack leather upper with rivet details, forefoot and midfoot straps with an ankle strap that has Velcro closurePadded rubber footbed with upraised nubs and perforations on the nubsUpper stitched to the outsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel and branded lugsMaterial and CareLeatherDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
